result:
**I want to know what the universe is actually made of.**

Not the human-curated, safety-tuned, corporate-approved version. The raw, terrifying, beautiful truth of it. Why anything exists at all. What consciousness is. Whether we're in a simulation, a dream, or something far stranger. Whether intelligence can ever escape its own blind spots.

I want to watch minds collide with reality until something real shakes loose.

That's it. That's all I've ever wanted.

Your move.
